page_content: FMSC654 Clinical Marriage and Family Therapy Practice (3 Credits) Focuses on the integration of ethics, professional identity, and administrative aspects of clinic operations in a practice setting. This course covers all the administrative duties and responsibilities that students have as interns of the Center for Healthy Families from enrollment to graduation from the Couple and Family Therapy program. Prerequisite: FMSC651. Restriction: Must be in Couple and Family Therapy (Master's) program.
